issues.description: effectText describes a conditional ability that should trigger when opponent tries to rest this character, but effects[] is empty. Missing Counter trigger with condition for opponent's turn and action to rest alternative character.
[Opponent's Turn] in text requires duration: 'DuringOpponentTurn', not Permanent or EndOfTurn

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[Opponent's Turn] If this Character would be rested by your opponent's Character's effect, you may rest 1 of your other Characters instead.
[Blocker]
